text: Fresh back from holiday, I see it again on social media: a call from the government to register your innovation that can accelerate housing construction. A program has made several million euros available for this purpose. Good news? Maybe. Labor productivity requires scaling.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: A program has made several million euros available for this purpose. Good news? Maybe. Labor productivity requires scaling. The fact is that labor productivity in construction has been stagnating for years.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: Good news? Maybe. Labor productivity requires scaling. The fact is that labor productivity in construction has been stagnating for years. While sectors such as logistics, industry and even healthcare digitalize and optimize their processes, labor productivity in construction fell by 2 percent between 2019 and 2023, according to the Economic Institute for Construction.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: Maybe. Labor productivity requires scaling. The fact is that labor productivity in construction has been stagnating for years. While sectors such as logistics, industry and even healthcare digitalize and optimize their processes, labor productivity in construction fell by 2 percent between 2019 and 2023, according to the Economic Institute for Construction. And while construction does not stand still.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: Labor productivity requires scaling. The fact is that labor productivity in construction has been stagnating for years. While sectors such as logistics, industry and even healthcare digitalize and optimize their processes, labor productivity in construction fell by 2 percent between 2019 and 2023, according to the Economic Institute for Construction. And while construction does not stand still. In fact, the sector is buzzing with innovations and inspiration.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: The fact is that labor productivity in construction has been stagnating for years. While sectors such as logistics, industry and even healthcare digitalize and optimize their processes, labor productivity in construction fell by 2 percent between 2019 and 2023, according to the Economic Institute for Construction. And while construction does not stand still. In fact, the sector is buzzing with innovations and inspiration. From apps to robots, from AI-driven maintenance to biobased construction products, applications tumble over each other at every trade fair and in every innovation program.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: While sectors such as logistics, industry and even healthcare digitalize and optimize their processes, labor productivity in construction fell by 2 percent between 2019 and 2023, according to the Economic Institute for Construction. And while construction does not stand still. In fact, the sector is buzzing with innovations and inspiration. From apps to robots, from AI-driven maintenance to biobased construction products, applications tumble over each other at every trade fair and in every innovation program. But here's the problem: innovations are no guarantee for productivity.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: And while construction does not stand still. In fact, the sector is buzzing with innovations and inspiration. From apps to robots, from AI-driven maintenance to biobased construction products, applications tumble over each other at every trade fair and in every innovation program. But here's the problem: innovations are no guarantee for productivity. For this they also have to be scaled up. > “Innovations are no guarantee for productivity”.

Pitfall of even more pilots. And that's exactly where it stops. New solutions are promoted through an acceleration program, but are not always applied more widely. text: And that's exactly where it stops. New solutions are promoted through an acceleration program, but are not always applied more widely. Instead of moving forward, we get stuck in pilots, living labs and demonstration projects. Governments, investors and regional development agencies enthusiastically stimulate innovations. There is money for solutions that focus on energy efficiency, predictive maintenance with AI and water-conscious construction.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: New solutions are promoted through an acceleration program, but are not always applied more widely. Instead of moving forward, we get stuck in pilots, living labs and demonstration projects. Governments, investors and regional development agencies enthusiastically stimulate innovations. There is money for solutions that focus on energy efficiency, predictive maintenance with AI and water-conscious construction. Well-intentioned, but it does not yet result in structural acceleration.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: Instead of moving forward, we get stuck in pilots, living labs and demonstration projects. Governments, investors and regional development agencies enthusiastically stimulate innovations. There is money for solutions that focus on energy efficiency, predictive maintenance with AI and water-conscious construction. Well-intentioned, but it does not yet result in structural acceleration. The result is lack of productivity growth, which should actually increase with the help of innovation.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: Governments, investors and regional development agencies enthusiastically stimulate innovations. There is money for solutions that focus on energy efficiency, predictive maintenance with AI and water-conscious construction. Well-intentioned, but it does not yet result in structural acceleration. The result is lack of productivity growth, which should actually increase with the help of innovation. Especially at the moment, when companies are reconsidering their investments due to economic and geopolitical uncertainty and are still struggling with failure costs, duplication of effort and sub-optimal planning.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: There is money for solutions that focus on energy efficiency, predictive maintenance with AI and water-conscious construction. Well-intentioned, but it does not yet result in structural acceleration. The result is lack of productivity growth, which should actually increase with the help of innovation. Especially at the moment, when companies are reconsidering their investments due to economic and geopolitical uncertainty and are still struggling with failure costs, duplication of effort and sub-optimal planning. Then it is risky to allow extra (public) money to spread over new initiatives without structural follow-up.

metadata.source_title: Innovation without scaling up is occupational therapy

text: Well-intentioned, but it does not yet result in structural acceleration. The result is lack of productivity growth, which should actually increase with the help of innovation. Especially at the moment, when companies are reconsidering their investments due to economic and geopolitical uncertainty and are still struggling with failure costs, duplication of effort and sub-optimal planning. Then it is risky to allow extra (public) money to spread over new initiatives without structural follow-up. That money easily disappears into a swamp of reports, meetings and draft reviews.

text: The result is lack of productivity growth, which should actually increase with the help of innovation. Then it is risky to allow extra (public) money to spread over new initiatives without structural follow-up. That money easily disappears into a swamp of reports, meetings and draft reviews. The sector knows this better than anyone else. > “Guarantee sufficient market volume to make investments profitable”.

The Dutch construction sector has been one of the best performing sectors in recent years, despite several challenges facing the sector. text:
She brings her experience and network, supplemented with knowledge from the Master City Developer (area development) course, to ABN AMRO clients. Read more in the construction sector. The Dutch construction sector has been one of the best performing sectors in recent years, despite several challenges facing the sector. Examples are the nitrogen dossier, the significant price increases for energy and building materials and also the personnel shortages. Driven by trends, innovations and legislation and regulations, the relevance of themes such as sustainability and environmental impact is growing and the sector is looking for a new balance. The Dutch construction sector has been one of the best performing sectors in recent years, despite several challenges facing the sector. Examples are the nitrogen dossier, the significant price increases for energy and building materials and also the personnel shortages. Driven by trends, innovations and legislation and regulations, the relevance of themes such as sustainability and environmental impact is growing and the sector is looking for a new balance.
